title: Retirement and pension system
doc_html:
§2425.  Retirement and pension system

The director shall prepare and, upon approval by the commission, shall submit to the mayor recommendations concerning actuarially sound retirement and pension systems for persons holding positions in the classified service.
doc_text:
§2425.  Retirement and pension system
The director shall prepare and, upon approval by the commission, shall submit to the mayor recommendations concerning actuarially sound retirement and pension systems for persons holding positions in the classified service.
